title: FMCG distributor resilience under currency stress
prompt: A regional FMCG brand wants to extend inventory credit to a distributor during currency volatility. What should the agent check before recommending approval?
bad_agent_pattern: Approve based on sales growth alone
Ignore supplier trust and route continuity
mvr_aware_pattern: Check repayment and transaction volatility evidence
Check stakeholder permission and distributor legitimacy
Ask for field notes and transaction logs before recommending credit
